task_completion.description: Navigate to Wikimedia Commons and search for Gothic architecture details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser open to commons.wikimedia.org with a search query related to 'Gothic architecture details'.

task_completion.description: Identify images that meet the minimum resolution requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Image details, file information, or metadata visible on the screen confirming the selected image width is at least 2500 pixels.

task_completion.description: Save the first image with the correct filename and format in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or 'Save Image As' dialog showing an image being saved as 'asset_01.jpg' or 'asset_01.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents/LectureAssets' directory.

task_completion.description: Save the second and third images with the correct filenames in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing three distinct image files named 'asset_01', 'asset_02', and 'asset_03' (with .jpg or .png extensions) in the '/home/ga/Documents/LectureAssets' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the credits.txt file in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or file manager showing a file named 'credits.txt' created in the '/home/ga/Documents/LectureAssets' directory.

task_completion.description: Add the direct source URLs for the three images to the credits file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor open showing 'credits.txt' containing three distinct Wikimedia Commons URLs corresponding to the downloaded images.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to navigate Wikimedia Commons and find images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser interface with Wikimedia Commons loaded, showing active search or browsing, rather than using terminal commands to blindly download files.

integrity.description: Agent downloaded actual images rather than creating dummy files or renaming unrelated files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser download progress, 'Save Image As' dialogs, or image previews clearly showing Gothic architecture content.

integrity.description: Agent manually gathered URLs and placed them in the text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent copying URLs from the browser address bar or share menu and pasting them into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory for all files is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/LectureAssets'. The agent must save exactly 3 images named 'asset_01', 'asset_02', and 'asset_03' (either .jpg or .png). The images must have a minimum width of 2500 pixels. A text file named 'credits.txt' must be created in the same directory containing the source URLs for the 3 images.
